summary: Phase 1.6 listing export execute step: client-side CSV/JSON serialization from ProductDraft, blocked-draft guard via canExportProductDraft, Vietnamese manual Seller Center upload success copy, export_completed analytics. No TikTok API or Postgres writes.

interfaceChanges.description: Serialize approved ProductDraft to CSV or JSON; throws ExportBlockedError when blocked.
Export execute step replaces placeholder with format picker, download, and success copy.

mappings.criterion: exportProductDraft returns valid JSON matching ProductDraft schema fields
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_export.test.ts::returns parseable JSON with required ProductDraft fields

mappings.criterion: exportProductDraft returns valid CSV matching ProductDraft schema fields
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_export.test.ts::returns valid CSV with schema field headers

mappings.criterion: blocked draft export throws error when compliance status is blocked
Export button disabled when compliance status blocked
Execute step export succeeds with Seller Center upload success message
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::Path A E2E export succeeds with Seller Center upload success message

mappings.criterion: Integration test Path A E2E approve list_products complete Path A export succeeds
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::Path A E2E export succeeds with Seller Center upload success message

mappings.criterion: Integration test Path B E2E complete Path B export succeeds
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::Path B E2E — complete Path B and export succeeds

mappings.criterion: UX instrumentation hook export_completed analytics event
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::Path A E2E export succeeds with Seller Center upload success message

mappings.criterion: No TikTok API calls no Postgres writes during workflow
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::does not call backend APIs during workflow
